traffic_classes.name: proxy_chat_observed
traffic_classes.description: Calls sent to /v1/chat/completions through token proxy.
traffic_classes.notes: All required token/cost/latency fields are available for proxied calls.

traffic_classes.name: cursor_routing_exhaust_partial
traffic_classes.description: Cursor routing preference exhaust artifacts with no per-turn attribution.
traffic_classes.notes: Preferences and candidate pool are visible; per-turn provider/model remains advisory.

traffic_classes.name: direct_provider_bypass
traffic_classes.description: Client calls sent directly to upstream provider and not through token proxy.
traffic_classes.notes: These requests are intentionally not visible in proxy telemetry.
